title: Wither Storm Story
description:
This is a mode where you will be haunted by fear, horror and especially Wither Storm!!!

Nowhere is your home and even if you are, it will be gone in a moment

Just something for beginners
body:
This is a mode where you will be haunted by fear, horror and especially Wither Storm!!!

Nowhere is your home and even if you are, it will be gone in a moment

Just something for beginners

He is the strongest boss


Helpful Instructions:
1.Spawn wither Storm
2.Wait until he has phase 5
3.Wait until the Withered Symbiont boss spawns
4.Kill him, he will shoot various projectiles at you (tridents, arrows, fireballs) but when he spawns mobs
then hit him from behind in the part of his body that lit up.
5.Wait a moment, then a commandblock book will appear above you, take it.
6.Make super tnt from it and then a foridibomb from it.
7.Light it and wait until Wither Storm takes it into his beam.
When Wither Storm explodes, he will be lying on the ground. 8.Try to destroy the commandblock but he will get up again.
9. Kill the Withered Symbiont again
10. Forge the commandblock book and pickaxe in the anvil and you will get a commandblock pickaxe, the only way you can kill Witherstorm is with that.
11. Wait until he has phase 7 and either has a hole in his forehead.
12. Throw an enderpearl into him or shoot him with a crossbow.
13. In Wither Storm, find the hall where the commandblock is.
14. Start breaking the commandblock with the commandblock pickaxe.
15. Mobs will spawn after that who want to kill you.
16.When you destroy the commandblock
CONGRATULATIONS WITHER STORM IS DEAD
